section_name: Vehicle approaching rotary traffic circle or island
text: Except where a traffic control device directs otherwise, the driver of a vehicle approaching or about to enter a rotary traffic circle or island shall yield the right of way to any vehicle already traveling on such circle or around such island.
markdown:
# Vehicle & Traffic Law
## Title 7
#### Article 26. Right of Way
##### § 1145 — Vehicle approaching rotary traffic circle or island

Except where a traffic control device directs otherwise, the driver of a vehicle approaching or about to enter a rotary traffic circle or island shall yield the right of way to any vehicle already traveling on such circle or around such island.

*Last modified: Sep. 22, 2014*
